title: Settings
subtitle: A dedicated place for console-level preferences, policy controls, and future system configuration.

update.title: Safe Update & Restart
update.subtitle: Only a fixed local repo can be updated, via `git pull --ff-only`, and restart is requested only after a new commit is pulled.
update.restartPending: A restart request has been recorded. Waiting for process shutdown and external relaunch.
update.restartRequestedHint: A restart request is already pending. Reason: {reason}, requested by: {requestedBy}
update.upToDateResult: Already up to date. No restart is needed.
update.confirmText: The server will run a single `git pull --ff-only` against the protected local repo. If a new commit is pulled, it will immediately request a restart.
update.confirmWarning: The backend will refuse this action if the working tree is dirty, the current branch is outside the allowlist, or no upstream branch is configured.

dist.title: WebUI Dist Replacement
dist.subtitle: Atomically replace the served directory from a configured prebuilt dist zip package without compiling on the server or restarting the backend.
dist.modeValue: Validate zip and replace the directory
dist.loadFailed: Failed to load WebUI dist state
dist.upToDateResult: The served WebUI dist is already up to date.
dist.replacedToast: WebUI dist replaced. Refresh the page to load it
dist.upToDateToast: WebUI dist is already up to date
dist.confirmText: The server will read or download the configured WebUI dist zip package, validate it, then copy the prebuilt assets into the served directory.
dist.confirmHint: This does not run npm/pnpm/yarn, does not execute arbitrary scripts, and does not restart the backend. Refresh the browser after replacement.

credentials.title: Administrator Account
credentials.subtitle: Update the login username and password.
credentials.mustChangeHint: You are using default credentials. You must update both username and password before continuing.
credentials.passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match
credentials.defaultNotAllowed: Default credentials are not allowed. Please update both username and password

pricing.title: Pricing Display
pricing.subtitle: Control the currency and token unit used by model pricing inputs and cost displays.
pricing.hint: The model editor follows this unit for display and input, while values are still stored internally per one million tokens so changing units will not damage existing data.
